concept: Give me a sports game where competitors race exoskeleton-enhanced snails through elaborate vertical garden courses. Customize your gastropod athlete's shell with aerodynamic modifications and secretion enhancements that create advantageous slime trails. Navigate living obstacle courses where plant life responds dynamically to your passage, opening new pathways or creating barriers. Rise through the underground racing circuit rankings while avoiding suspicious sponsors who may be harvesting your snail's unique mucus for questionable pharmaceutical purposes.
